keywords:
EN: [DeepSeek-R1, DeepSeek-V3, GRPO (Group Relative Policy Optimization), Reasoning Models, Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA), Chain-of-Thought (CoT) Distillation, FP8 Precision Training, Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), Agentic RAG, Quantization (GGUF/EXL2), Long Context Optimization, Speculative Decoding]

VN: [DeepSeek-R1, Mô hình suy luận (Reasoning Models), GRPO, Tối ưu hóa Attention (MLA), Chưng cất tri thức (Knowledge Distillation), Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), RAG nâng cao (Agentic RAG), Lượng tử hóa mô hình (Quantization), Huấn luyện độ chính xác FP8, Xử lý ngữ cảnh dài (Long Context)]

JP: [DeepSeek-R1, 推論モデル (Reasoning Models), 思考の連鎖 (Chain-of-Thought), 混合専門家家モデル (Mixture of Experts), 量子化 (Quantization), 知識蒸留 (Knowledge Distillation), 強化学習 (GRPO), ローカルLLM (Local LLM), マルチモーダル学習, FP8 低精度訓練]
